testsuite.system-err: [Test worker] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 147.0.7727.57 (resolved driver for Chrome 147) [Test worker] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as C:\Users\Girish Chandra\.cache\selenium\chromedriver\win64\147.0.7727.57\chromedriver.exe Apr 22, 2026 11:09:48 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 22, 2026 11:09:48 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.102. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.31.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
